'''Pantolomin Shipwrights''' was a small, family-owned manufacturer based in the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Panto Prime]]. It produced sea and land bearing luxury cruisers, which were custom-built. The vessels were built with exquisite craftsmanship. Less than a dozen craft were produced every standard [[Standard year/Legends|year]].<ref name="EGVV" />

{{Company-stub}}
